summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Albanian OrderFlow system. All core functionality working perfectly with 92% backend API success and 100% frontend UI success. Authentication, client management, order management, and dashboard features fully operational.

expected_behaviors.issue: Returns 400 when trying to register 3rd user (2-user limit reached)
expected_behaviors.impact: Expected behavior - system correctly enforces 2-user business rule

passed_tests: User authentication with existing admin@orderflow.com account
Dashboard loads with Albanian stats (Pasqyra, Klientët Gjithsej, Porosi Gjithsej, etc.)
Client creation with full Albanian form (Emri, Mbiemri, IG, Adresa, Telefoni)
Client appears in table with proper Albanian headers and data
Order creation with client selection, 5000 Lekë price, shipping type selection
Order appears in orders table with proper Albanian status badges
Dropdown menus and actions work correctly (edit, delete options)
Albanian toast notifications for success messages
Navigation between dashboard, clients, and orders pages
All form validation and Albanian error handling
All backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for clients and orders
Dashboard statistics endpoint returning proper aggregated data
Authentication token management and protected routes

success_percentage.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 expected business rule failure)
